name: Growth hormone
summary: Growth hormone is normalized as a TRIIM combination component in the uncontrolled human epigenetic-age pilot.
mechanism_summary: Represents recombinant growth-hormone exposure within a multi-component thymic-regeneration and metabolic regimen, so attribution is confounded.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: TRIIM human epigenetic aging pilot; TRIIM reported lower epigenetic age in an uncontrolled human pilot.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
